logos.name: Full Logo (Dark)
logos.usage: Use on light backgrounds when full wordmark is needed.

logos.name: Full Logo (Light)
logos.usage: Use on dark backgrounds when full wordmark is needed.

logos.name: Icon (Black on White)
logos.usage: Use when a white plate is required.

logos.name: Icon (White on Black)
logos.usage: Use when a black plate is required.

logos.name: ARIO Token Logo
logos.usage: Official logo for the ARIO token.

colors.name: Primary
colors.usage: Primary brand color for CTAs, links, and accents.

colors.name: Lavender
colors.usage: Secondary color for gradients and backgrounds.

colors.name: Black
colors.usage: Primary text color and dark elements.

colors.name: White
colors.usage: Background and light text on dark surfaces.

rules: Use dark logo variants on light backgrounds and light variants on dark backgrounds.
Do not alter logo proportions, colors, or orientation.
Prefer SVG for digital interfaces; use PNG where raster output is required.
Use lowercase 'ar.io' except sentence starts where 'Ar.io' is acceptable.
